sections.title: Halteviewer
sections.text:
Halteviewer API

## Data

Below you'll find the data structures used in the functions of this section.

### Type Quay

- Integer `concession_id`
- String `quaycode`
- String `stopplace`
- String `quaytype`
- String `quayname`
- List<Double> `geom`
- String `town`
- String `street`
- String `concessionprovidercode`
- String `municipalitycode`
- Boolean `quaydisabledaccessible`
- Date `mutationdate`
- Integer `quay_id`
- Boolean `quayvisuallyaccessible`
- Integer `compassdirection`
- String `transportmode`
- String `quaystatus`
- Boolean `liftedbicyclepath`
- Boolean `greenstop`
- String `remarks`
- String `quayownercode`
- Boolean `to_inspect`
- String `stopsidecode`
- String `stopdatamanager`
- String `concessioncode`
- boolean `shelter`

### Type QuaySummary

- QuayCounts `quays`
- List<QuaySummaryAuthority> `authorities`

### Type QuaySummaryAuthority

- QuayCounts `quays`
- List<Double> `centroid`
- String `authority`

### Type QuayCounts

- Integer `numQuays`
- Integer `numAccessible`
- Integer `numVisualAccessible`
- Integer `numDisabledAccessible`

### Type QuayDetails

- String `quaycode`
- CHBSource `source`
- QuayGeneralDetails `general`
- QuayFacilityDetails `facilities`
- QuayAccessibilityDetails `accessibility`
- PSAUserStopCode[] `psa`

### Type QuayAccessibilityDetails

- String `quayshapetype`
- Double `baylength`
- Boolean `markedkerb`
- Boolean `lift`
- Boolean `guidelines`
- Boolean `groundsurfaceindicator`
- Boolean `stopplaceaccessroute`
- Double `kerbheight`
- Double `boardingpositionwidth`
- Double `alightingpositionwidth`
- Double `liftedpartlength`
- Double `narrowestpassagewidth`
- Boolean `fulllengthguideline`
- Boolean `guidelinestopplaceconnection`
- Boolean `tactilegroundsurfaceindicator`
- Boolean `ramp`
- Double `rampwidth`
- Double `heightwithenvironment`
- Double `bayentranceangles`
- Double `bayexitangles`
- Double `embaymentwidth`
- Boolean `liftedbicyclepath`
- Double `ramplength`
- Boolean `audiobutton`
- Boolean `rightposition`
- String `obstacles`

### Type QuayFacilityDetails

- Boolean `shelter`
- Boolean `shelterpublicity`
- Boolean `illuminatedstop`
- Boolean `seatavailable`
- Boolean `leantosupport`
- Boolean `timetableinformation`
- Boolean `infounit`
- Boolean `routenetworkmap`
- Boolean `passengerinformationdisplay`
- Boolean `bicycleparking`
- Integer `numberofbicycleplaces`
- Boolean `bins`
- Boolean `ovccico`
- Boolean `ovccharging`
- String `stopsigntype`
- Boolean `stopsign`
- String `passengerinformationdisplaytype`

### Type QuayGeneralDetails

- String `quaycode`
- String `town`
- String `street`
- String `quayname`
- String `quayvisuallyaccessible`
- String `quaydisabledaccessible`
- Integer `compassdirection`
- String `quaystatus`
- List<Double> `geom`
- String `stopsidecode`
- Boolean `greenstop`
- String `municipalitycode`
- String `quayownercode`
- String `transportmode`
- String `quaytype`
- String `remarks`
- String `hectometersign`
- String `roadcode`
- String `stopinternalnr`
- String `stopobjectnr`
- String `concessionprovidercode`
- Integer `quaylevel`
- String `stopdatamanager`
- List<Double> `geom28992`
- Boolean `onlygetout`
- String `concessioncode`
- Date `date_in_use`
- Date `date_out_of_use`
- ArrayList<Object> `geomWgs84`

### Type CHBSource

- String `file_name`
- Date `file_date`

functions.name: status
functions.text:
boolean status(): 
Returns true if api status of dova base registration api is OK

Errors: 
- `Exception`

functions.name: getSitePathLinkForComponent
functions.text:
SitePathLink[] getSitePathLinkForComponent(Integer componentId, String componentType): 


Errors: 
- `Exception`

functions.name: getQuays
functions.text:
Quay[] getQuays(): 
Get all quays from base registration. It uses an api-user which has to be registered in the auth service with sufficient credentials.

Errors: 
- `Exception`

functions.name: getSummary
functions.text:
QuaySummary getSummary(): 
Get summary of number of quays, and per authority a quay-count per category and centroid.

Errors: 
- `Exception`

functions.name: getQuaysForAuthority
functions.text:
QuayMapView[] getQuaysForAuthority(String providercode): 
Get quays given authority code `providercode`.

Errors: 
- `Exception`

functions.name: getQuay
functions.text:
QuayDetails getQuay(String quaycode): 
Get quay info given a `quaycode`

Errors: 
- `Exception`

functions.name: searchStopplace
functions.text:
Stopplace[] searchStopplace(String search): 
Search for stopplace with code, name or town given a search string. Returns a list of stopplaces (with quays) as proposals.

Errors: 
- `Exception`

functions.name: getNavPathLinks
functions.text:
NavPath[] getNavPathLinks(String stopplacecode, Integer componentFromId, String fromType, String toType): 


Errors: 
- `Exception`

functions.name: getEquipmentStatusesForStopplaces
functions.text:
Object[] getEquipmentStatusesForStopplaces(): 
Get each stopplacecode with its equipments and the equipmentstatus.
Each equipment has a base registration equipment, liftdata equipment and last equipment update object.

Errors: 
- `Exception`

functions.name: getEquipmentStatusesForStopplace
functions.text:
Object getEquipmentStatusesForStopplace(String stopplacecode): 
Get equipments and the equipmentstatus from one stopplace
Each equipment has a base registration equipment, liftdata equipment and last equipment update object.

Errors: 
- `Exception`

functions.name: getDescriptions
functions.text:
Object getDescriptions(): 
Get description matching the SIRIFM description for all equipments with a (usefull) description.

Errors: 
- `Exception`
